name: Gobi Paratha
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together salt and flour.
2. Rub in ghee, then add enough water to make a stiff dough.
3. Mix together the rest of the ingredients.
4. Divide the dough into lemon-sized balls.
5. Roll out each ball into a not too thin disc or chapati on a floured board.
6. Spread the cauliflower mixture on one round chapati and cover with another round chapati.
7. Seal the edges nicely, sprinkle a little dry flour on top, then roll out the paratha as thinly and as roundly as possible, being careful not to break it.
8. Grease a smoking tava or griddle with ghee and place the paratha over it.
9. When one side turns a little golden colored, apply ghee on the top and turn over.
10. Press gently and cover this side also with some ghee. Continue turning and applying a little ghee until the paratha turns golden colored.
11. Serve piping hot with a tablespoon of butter and a bowl of seasoned curds.
